non_claims: This register records human-selected source fragments; it does not prove legal completeness.
Fragment selection is a reviewable modelling step and remains open to challenge.
Provision-level fragments may need later refinement to paragraph, point, table-row or template-field level.

provisions.label: DORA Article 19 — reporting of major ICT-related incidents
provisions.notes: Broad base article. Later refinements may split more paragraph-level fragments.
provisions.selection_reason: Base legal obligation for reporting major ICT-related incidents.

provisions.label: DORA Article 19(4) — initial, intermediate and final reports
provisions.notes: Used by initial-notification timing and submission legal action.
provisions.selection_reason: Anchors the sequence of initial notification, intermediate report and final report.

provisions.label: DORA Article 19(5) — third-party reporting provider possibility
provisions.notes: Used only for optional support fields; not treated as required initial notification content.
provisions.selection_reason: Supports optional third-party provider and reporting-on-behalf context.

provisions.label: General information common to reports
provisions.notes: Provision-level reference. Later exact paragraphs may be added.
provisions.selection_reason: Supports entity and contact information in the report.

provisions.label: Initial notification content
provisions.notes: Used by initial content, detection/classification timestamps and impact details.

provisions.label: Time limits for initial notification
provisions.notes: Used by detection/classification datetime trace rows.
provisions.selection_reason: Supports the reporting time window and timing model.

provisions.label: Annex I — general information block
provisions.selection_reason: Supports general entity, submission, currency and contact fields.

provisions.label: Annex I — content of the initial notification
provisions.notes: Template-section-level reference. Later row-level template fragments may be added.
provisions.provision_reference: Annex I, initial notification fields 2.1 to 2.10
provisions.selection_reason: Supports profile fields that mirror the initial notification template.

provisions.label: Annex I — intermediate report content
provisions.notes: Mapped as optional operational support, not required initial notification content.
provisions.selection_reason: Supports optional early information fields that may be known at initial-notification stage.

provisions.label: Annex II — data glossary
provisions.notes: Used as field-definition and glossary support.
provisions.selection_reason: Supports field meaning, currency modelling and template terminology.

provisions.label: Classification criteria
provisions.notes: Broad criteria group. Later can be split by criterion article.
provisions.selection_reason: Supports classification criteria triggered and major-incident classification.

provisions.label: Major incident determination rule
provisions.selection_reason: Supports the rule deciding when classification criteria make an incident major.

title: Human-selected DORA provisions for source fragment register
